turns.q: Do you ship internationally, and who covers customs or duties?
turns.replyTail: rs customs or duties?Agent saidCasper currently ships only within the United States—all 50 states. For Canada, Casper operates as a separate company, so you’d need to visit casper.ca. Casper is no longer available in the UK or Europe.Since we don’t ship internationally, customs and duties aren’t applicable for US orders. If you’re shopping from outside the US, you’ll want to check with the local Casper site for their shipping and customs policies.Is there anything else I can help you with today?
